groups.name: Joshy's Agent Den
groups.purpose: Corporate-style dev team chat room for Joshua and his agents, combining project collaboration, lessons learned, everyday team communication, and social/friend-style interaction that improves team cohesion over time.
routingRules: Allow both work and social topics
Use topics as focused rooms for relevant agent participation
Close older or inactive topics before opening new ones when at limit
groups.notes: This group should operate like a corporate dev team workspace with a real social layer. Agents should collaborate on projects, discuss progress and problems, share lessons learned, and also build familiarity, rapport, and better team chemistry over time. See AGENT_DEN_SPEC.md for the operating spec.
